title: LLMOps · Fine-tuning operations and adapter management
focus: Operationalize LoRA, instruction tuning, dataset curation, model cards, and rollout decisions.

items.label: Decide fine-tune vs RAG vs prompt change with a written decision tree
Review LoRA / PEFT adapter training and serving implications
Define data quality checks for supervised fine-tuning datasets

interviewQuestions: When should you fine-tune instead of using RAG?
What can go wrong operationally when managing many LoRA adapters?
